title: Smoky Pillowy Mediterranean Frankfurter Paella
description: A cozy mediterranean dish featuring a smoky, pillowy frankfurter paired with a miso-marinate, perfect for a weeknight dinner.

ingredients.name: Frankfurter
ingredients.notes: preferably smoked or grilled for extra smokiness

ingredients.name: Miso paste
ingredients.notes: helps to add depth and umami flavor

ingredients.name: Chickpeas
ingredients.notes: canned or cooked from scratch, drained and rinsed

ingredients.name: Olive oil
ingredients.notes: use a mild or neutral-tasting oil

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large paella pan over medium-high heat.
Add the garlic and saut29 for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the chickpeas, artichoke hearts, and green beans. Cook, stirring occasionally, for 5 minutes.
Add the tomato paste and miso paste. Cook, stirring constantly, for 1 minute.
Add the frankfurter and cook, stirring occasionally, until heated through.
Stir in the lemon juice and cook for an additional 1 minute.
Transfer the paella pan to the oven and cook at 375 for 10-12 minutes, until the ingredients are heated through and the flavors have melded together.
Remove the pan from the oven and let it rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
Slice the sausages and place them on top of the paella before serving for a pop of color and added texture.
